description_long: This is a standard-sized tube of Colgate toothpaste, featuring a predominantly white body with a bold red rectangular label displaying the Colgate brand name in large white letters. The tube is slightly flattened and tapers towards a red screw-on cap at one end, which is cylindrical and contrasts with the rest of the tube. The surface of the tube appears smooth and slightly glossy, with a small green square detail near the base. The tube is made of a flexible plastic material, allowing it to be squeezed to dispense the toothpaste inside. The overall design is clean and modern, with the branding clearly visible from multiple angles.
description: A white Colgate toothpaste tube with a red screw-on cap and a bold red label, featuring a smooth, slightly glossy surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Colgate logo prominently on the white tube, with the base and a small green square visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the elongated tube, the full Colgate label, and the red cap at the end.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the red cap opening and the back of the tube, with the label partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the tube's length, the red cap, and the Colgate label from a different angle.
attribute_label_design: Red rectangular label with white Colgate text, minimalistic design, small green square near base, no additional graphics.
attribute_tube_orientation: lying horizontally with cap to the left
